description: TS package with dual entries (node+browser) plus Go and C++ stubs

notes: Generates a minimal multi-target library scaffold:
- projects/libs/<name>-core (C/C++ core + tiny C wrapper for wasm/static linking)
- projects/libs/<name>-go (Go c-archive stub for Node addon path)
- projects/libs/<name>-native (N-API addon using the Go c-archive)
- projects/libs/<name>-ts (TypeScript package with node and browser entrypoints)
